title: KTFextra
description: Integrates Medieval siege machines, Smallships, and Musket mod int Terrafirmacraft gameplay.
body:
This is a mod that integrates Medieval siege machines, Musket mod, and Smallships mod to terrafirmacraft.

Terrafirmacraft's own crafting systems, such as anvil recipe and metal casting is used to create intermediete components making Siege weapons ballanced in Terrafirmacraft.
Muskets and Smallships ships, and Siege weapons are all locked behind apropriate levels of progression.
The mod Adds a total of 24 new items, and hundreds of crafting recipes.
